title: NCC Character Bootstrap Spec
description: Owner-authored JSON spec for bootstrapping a new NCC character namespace. The bootstrap tool creates folders, base files, and metadata — never images.

schema_version.description: Contract version for this spec file.

character_id.description: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE character identifier. Must match ^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$ and not start with _.

prompt_subject.description: Neutral prompt-facing alias used in generation prompts.

identity_anchor.description: Owner-approved identity text used in CANON_GENERATION_PROMPTS and IDENTITY_DRAFT.

style_direction.description: Owner-approved visual direction for prompt style rules.

safety_rules.description: Non-empty list of safety rules for generation contexts.

next_step.description: Owner-approved next action for the character.
